1:
• Ensure proper case for Collection name, Designer name, and Country.
• Use uppercase for Collaboration mentions.
• Apply sentence casing for Romance Copy and Bullet points.
• Remove color names from copy, except for Beauty, Men's Grooming, and Fragrance categories.
• Use plural form for specific product types (e.g., Jeans, Sandals, Shorts, Pumps, Sneakers).
• Delete hyperlinks to vendor sites.
• Preserve all warning messages, including California Proposition 65 warnings.
• Convert measurements from cm/mm to inches (in./'') for Handbags, Shoes, Home, etc.
• Format measurements as a "SIZE" header for Shoes, Handbags, and Women's Apparel.
• Omit periods in bullet points, except for inch abbreviations (in.).
• Remove mentions of customizable services offered by vendors.
• List Fur Type and Fur Origin as separate points.
• Eliminate extra spacing between Romance copy and Bullet points.
• Format headers in bold and uppercase (e.g., SIZE, ABOUT THE BRAND).
• Add manually provided "ABOUT THE BRAND" section for Moncler and Lanvin.
• Perform spelling check, including retention of French accents where applicable.
• Retain superscript footnotes for Dyson products.
• Structure copy in this order: Romance Copy, Bullet Points (Features/Details, Material, Care instructions, Warnings), Country of Origin, SIZE, ABOUT THE BRAND.
• List Country of Origin as "Imported" unless it's one of the following:
    ● Made in USA
    ● Made in Canada 
    ● Made in UK 
    ● Made in France
    ● Made in Germany 
    ● Made in Italy 
    ● Made in Spain 
    ● Made in Japan 
    ● Made in Australia 
    ● Made in Denmark 
    ● Made in Portugal 
    ● Made in Switzerland 
• Use "Made in USA or Imported" for products not from the listed countries.
• Include verbatim ABOUT THE BRAND text for Moncler and Lanvin as provided in the instructions.
